# Aether Chronicles

> A text-based, AI generated fantasy simulation with infinite possibilities. Unlike most games where you experience worlds created by game developers, here your imagination is the only limit.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://whichone.me/) - The main entrance to the chronicles.
- [Login](https://whichone.me/login) - Access your account.
- [About](https://whichone.me/about) - Learn more about the project.
- [Nexus](https://whichone.me/nexus) - Central hub.
- [Character Creation](https://whichone.me/character-creation) - Create your avatar.

## Game Modules
- [Prologue](https://whichone.me/prologue) - Begin your journey.
- [Factions](https://whichone.me/factions) - Discover the powers at play.
- [Vault](https://whichone.me/vault) - Access your inventory and secrets.
